tagline: Personalized Web3 research digest based on your on-chain behavior
description:
Web3 Daily provides AI-powered crypto research digests tailored to your investment profile. Simply provide your wallet address to get personalized insights based on your on-chain holdings, trading history, and DeFi positions.

Features:
- Public Digest: Macro news, KOL sentiment analysis, market overview
- Personalized Digest: Custom recommendations based on your portfolio
- User Profile: Deep analysis of your on-chain behavior and investment style
- Telegram Delivery: Optional scheduled push notifications

No API keys required - all infrastructure is managed server-side.
